subject: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Hi all,

Thanks for a productive Launch Retrospective today. Here's a summary of what
we decided:

DECISIONS:
- We will proceed with Option C for the Notification Hub migration
(projected savings: $162K/yr)
- Horizon launch date moved to Q4 (from original Q2 target)
- Marketing team will own the Security Hardening workstream going forward

OPEN QUESTIONS:
- How does this affect the Pinnacle Analytics contract timeline? (Grace to
investigate)
- Do we need additional headcount for Senior Engineer? (Grace to assess)

Full notes: https://confluence.internal/f4d085b9479d

Regards,
David

subject: Re: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
All,

Following up from the Architecture Summit earlier today. Here are the action
items:

- @Fatima: Finalize the timeline by Tuesday (target: 5/26)
- @David: Schedule the OKR Planning review with HR
- @Irene: Update the Search Index configuration per our discussion
- @Steve: Send out the revised Project Apex timeline by EOW

Next meeting: Tuesday at 8:30. Calendar invite to follow.

Thanks everyone,
Steve

subject: Re: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Hi David,

I had a call with DataFlow Systems today about the Logging Service
integration. Key takeaways:

- They can deliver the alpha phase by 6/22, which is 4 weeks ahead of our
schedule
- Pricing: $110K for the base package + $19K for Incident Response add-on
- They require a 2-year commitment minimum
- Technical contact will be Karen Martin (Software Engineer)

For comparison, NetSecure Pro quoted $105K with a more flexible contract.

Should we bring this to the Quarterly Review for a final decision?

Best,
Fatima
--
Fatima Davis
Cyberdyne | Legal Department
Phone: +1-461-496-4893 | Email: fatima.davis@cyberdyne.systems

subject: Re: Action Items from Team Offsite Kickoff
content:
Hi David,

Thanks for flagging this. I've escalated to the Support team and they're
looking into the Legacy CRM issue. Current status:

- Root cause: unhandled null pointer in batch job
- Impact: ~100 users affected in EMEA
- ETA for fix: 12:30 GMT today
- Severity: P2

I'll keep this thread updated as we learn more. Irene is the point person if
you need immediate assistance.

Workaround: Contact support for manual override.

Regards,
Fatima
---
Fatima Davis | Software Engineer
Cyberdyne
M: +1-461-496-4893 | E: fatima.davis@cyberdyne.systems
